behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, because the failure is at the boundary between summary persistence and stored per-dimension findings for the same round. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit is too low since this is not a single-function rule check; it requires module/data handoff. System is not required because behavior text is only about "stored" findings, not real OS/network/subprocess. Agentic/Workflow are not required because no model output or agent sequence is involved. FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary service + findings repository against a local test DB. Seed round R with at least one FAIL dimension finding. Attempt to store a PASS summary for round R. Assert the write is rejected (domain error) and no PASS summary is persisted.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, because the bug is in gate computation wiring to storage vs. trusting manual summary text. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit is too low since a pure function test would not prove the gate actually reads stored findings. Behavior text mentions "stored findings" and "summary text" only, so no real OS/network/subprocess (not System), no AI output dependence (not Agentic), and no multi-agent sequence (not Workflow). FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Seed stored findings for round R with one FAIL and set manual summary text to "all PASS". Run stop-gate computation through real service wiring. Assert verdict is blocking/non-PASS from stored findings. Change summary text and rerun; assert verdict remains driven by stored findings.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, because this spans request validation plus audit-record persistence. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit is too low since behavior requires a persisted auditable warning side effect across modules. No real OS/network/subprocess requirement in text (not System). No model-output correctness involved (not Agentic). No multi-step agent pipeline (not Workflow). FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Call manual-summary update without override flag when text conflicts with stored findings; assert rejection. Call with explicit override flag; assert acceptance only if an audit warning record is created containing actor, round, and override reason/details.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the gate requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit before PASS can be finalized.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, because correctness depends on metadata handoff between fix-commit tracking and gate freshness checks. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit is too low because commit/round linkage must be validated across modules. System is rejected: behavior text requires ordering ("produced after the latest fix commit"), not real git subprocess/network behavior. Agentic/Workflow are rejected because this check is freshness metadata, not model-output quality or multi-agent sequencing. FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Seed commit metadata with latest fix commit C1 and an older review round R0 tied to C0. Attempt PASS finalization with R0 and assert stale-round rejection. Add review round R1 tied to C1 (or later) and assert freshness check passes.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Agentic, because behavior explicitly requires a "live review loop" and that a "review-agent round runs" on updated diff. PASS2-AUDIT: Integration is too low; stubs can fake round completion and hide failures where the real model-backed review round is never actually executed. Workflow is rejected because the behavior specifies a single fresh round prerequisite ("a fresh review-agent round"), not multiple agentic steps chained. FINAL: Agentic.
behaviors.test_description: In a live environment, update the diff (new commit) and attempt PASS finalization; assert blocked for missing fresh review round. Trigger a real review-agent run for that commit and wait for completion artifact. Retry finalization and assert the freshness block is cleared (other gates may still block for unrelated reasons).

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, the outcome is escalation rather than PASS.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, because this is gate logic over persisted round/finding state. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit is too low since round exhaustion + MUST-FIX resolution status usually comes from multiple persistence/service modules. System is not required (no OS/network/subprocess in behavior text). Agentic is not required because behavior is explicitly about "stored results," not live model judgment. Workflow is not required because no live multi-step execution is required to reproduce the failure. FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Seed local storage with round count at max and unresolved MUST-FIX findings. Run final decision computation. Assert PASS is impossible and outcome is escalation, including references to unresolved MUST-FIX items.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Workflow, because behavior explicitly names a "live multi-round review workflow" with exhaustion logic and escalation emission. PASS2-AUDIT: Integration is too low due LLM-involved stage handoff across rounds. Agentic alone is too low because the failure boundary is not one model call; it is multiple agentic steps in sequence with state carryover. System is also lower than needed because the key risk is multi-step agent pipeline correctness. FINAL: Workflow.
behaviors.test_description: Run an end-to-end live review workflow with max rounds >1 on an update that leaves a known MUST-FIX unresolved across rounds. Execute consecutive real review rounds until exhausted. Assert PASS remains blocked and an escalation record/event is emitted with round history and unresolved MUST-FIX evidence.
